query: create a gh issue.. unimatrix is unhealthy.. youve attempted 2 localized fixes (the last 2 PR's) to try to resolve, however, since the implemenation of crt-014 we've been unstable.  You saw one issue above... another session saw Cycle stopped. The store call is hitting a timing issue with the connection. .  I want to perform a all encompassing availability review of this mcp server.  It had been fine prior to crt-014... Review the full architecture, we've continued to add responsibilities of the backtick processes over time... so I want a complete availability review, and also identify architecture choke points that won't scale to 3-5 times the volume we currently have.  This is a broad research request that should identify opportunities in priority order how to enhance the availability, and in the future scalability of unimatrix.  Store detailed research, findings and analysis in product/research/ass-020 and also tie it to the gh issue.  If unimatrix is unavailable, continue as its reliability is why we're performing this review.

entries.title: ADR-003 nan-003: context_status Pre-flight Check for /unimatrix-seed
ADR-004: Non-Blocking Knowledge Queries with 5s Timeout
Service Replacement in unimatrix-server Generates 26x Compile Cycles Without Targeted Test Scoping
Pre-existing pool timeout failures in unimatrix-server unit tests (GH#303)
context_store failures during heavy compilation phases — contention or timing issue
